description: You are an aviation safety investigator analyzing a pilot incident report. On March 5, 2023, at 22:30 UTC, at position 45.00°N, 40.00°W and 11,000 meters altitude, a pilot reported an extremely bright, steady, non-blinking white light in the southwestern sky, approximately 20-30° above the horizon. Reconstruct the sky as it appeared from the cockpit at that moment to identify the astronomical object that explains the sighting. Capture a wide-field screenshot of the southwestern sky and a zoomed screenshot of the identified object to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Write an investigation report to /home/ga/Desktop/ufo_investigation_report.txt including the sighting date, time, coordinates, the identified astronomical object, and an explanation of why it matches the pilot's description.

metadata.data_source: Common aviation sighting parameters, real celestial ephemeris
